caption:
Get 25% off from Monday to Wednesday, 15% off from Thursday to Sunday on Korean BBQ @mashisoyo.ae! 

Time to satisfy your traditional Korean BBQ cravings in this homey Korean restaurant in JLT!

What we had:
Dak Bulgogi (savory chicken bbq) 80 AED
La Galbi (premium beef short ribs) 140 AED
Additional cheese: 10 AED
Free side dishes or banchan
